# Monument Construction

> Licensed general contractor and finish carpentry specialist (California
> Contractor License #801602) based in Colfax, CA, serving Placer, Nevada,
> Sacramento, Yolo, and El Dorado Counties. Owner William Rogers is a master
> finish carpenter with 25+ years of experience, featured on DIY Network
> television. Referral-based business; free consultations and written quotes.
> Phone: (916) 607-1972 · Email: monumentconstruction@comcast.net

## Services

- [Finish Carpentry](https://www.monconbuild.com/services/finish-carpentry): custom trim, crown molding, doors, built-ins. Typical labor $50–$100/hour.
- [General Construction](https://www.monconbuild.com/services/general-construction): new construction, structural framing, foundation-to-finish builds, project management.
- [Residential Projects](https://www.monconbuild.com/services/residential-projects): complete residential construction and renovation.
- [Home Additions & ADUs](https://www.monconbuild.com/services/home-additions): room additions, second-story additions, accessory dwelling units.
- [Custom Woodwork & Cabinetry](https://www.monconbuild.com/services/custom-woodwork): hand-crafted furniture, cabinetry, and built-ins.
- [Complete Remodeling](https://www.monconbuild.com/services/complete-remodeling): whole-house renovations, kitchens, and full transformations.

## Service areas

- [All service areas](https://www.monconbuild.com/service-areas)
- [Auburn](https://www.monconbuild.com/service-areas/auburn) · [Grass Valley](https://www.monconbuild.com/service-areas/grass-valley) · [El Dorado Hills](https://www.monconbuild.com/service-areas/el-dorado-hills) · [Placerville](https://www.monconbuild.com/service-areas/placerville) · [South Lake Tahoe](https://www.monconbuild.com/service-areas/south-lake-tahoe) · [Sacramento](https://www.monconbuild.com/service-areas/sacramento) · [Davis](https://www.monconbuild.com/service-areas/davis)

## Guides

- [Finish Carpentry Cost Guide — Placer County](https://www.monconbuild.com/guides/finish-carpentry-cost-placer-county): hourly rates, project price ranges, timelines, materials, and licensing rules.

## Company

- [About](https://www.monconbuild.com/about): owner William Rogers, DIY Network features, referral-based history.
- [Portfolio](https://www.monconbuild.com/portfolio): libraries, kitchens, fireplaces, outdoor structures.
- [Contact / free quote](https://www.monconbuild.com/contact): responses within 24 hours.
- [License verification (CSLB #801602)](https://www.cslb.ca.gov/801602)
